betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Decay Hastener: Accelerated Radioactive Decay§f

§aThe Decay Hastener accelerates the decay of radioactive isotopes into stable daughter isotopes.§f
The §bDecay Hastener§f (`nuclearcraft:decay_hastener`) is NuclearCraft's §b1-item + 1-item-output§f processor that performs §b§f§cradioactive decay acceleration§f§f. Radioactive isotopes fed into the machine are §b§f§cdecayed into their daughter isotopes§f§f at an accelerated rate (set by recipe time multiplier), bypassing the natural decay rate.

§6Crafting Recipe (graph: minecraft.crafting)§f:
Per the JEI graph, the Decay Hastener recipe requires:
- §bAdvanced Plating§f (`nuclearcraft:part:1`)
- §bEnergetic Blend§f (`nuclearcraft:compound:2`) — NC's radiation source material
- §bSolinium Nugget§f (`hbm:nugget_solinium`) — HBM's exotic radiation-reactive material
- §bMachine Chassis§f (`nuclearcraft:part:10`)
- §bCopper Solenoid§f (`nuclearcraft:part:4`)

§6Function (DecayHastenerRecipes.java)§f:
Per `DecayHastenerRecipes` constructor: `super("decay_hastener", 1, 0, 1, 0)`:
- §bSlots: 1 item input + 0 fluid inputs + 1 item output + 0 fluid outputs§f
- §bPower: FE only§f
- §bUpgrades: Speed / Energy§f

§6Recipes (DecayHastenerRecipes.java)§f:
The class calls `addDecayRecipes(name1, name2, radSource)` to register paired parent → daughter isotope recipes, including:
- §bThorium → Lead§f (RadSources.THORIUM)
- §bBismuth → Thallium§f (RadSources.BISMUTH)
- §bRadium → Lead§f (RadSources.RADIUM)
- §bPolonium → Lead§f (RadSources.POLONIUM)
- §bTBP → TBU§f (RadSources.TBP)

§6Why It's Useful§f:
- §bIsotope Cleanup§f: radioactive byproducts from §b§f§cspent nuclear fuel§f§f can be §b§f§caccelerated to stable isotopes§f§f in the Decay Hastener, removing the radiation hazard.
- §bStable Daughter Production§f: §b§f§cLead§f§f (a useful industrial material) can be produced by hastening the decay of §bThorium§f, §bRadium§f, or §bPolonium§f.
- §b§f§cQMD recipes§f§f: the §b§f§cDecay Chamber Controller§f§f uses the Decay Hastener as a §b§f§cchassis component§f§f — see Q463.

§6Direct Descendants (graph-confirmed)§f:
- §bDecay Neutron Collector§f (`nuclearcraft:decay_neutron_collector`, via NC Assembler)
- §bQMD Decay Chamber Controller§f (`qmd:decay_chamber_controller`, via vanilla crafting)

§6Component Supply Chain§f:
- §bAdvanced Plating§f → from §bTough Alloy Ingot§f + §bRedstone§f
- §bEnergetic Blend§f → from §bNC Manufactory§f using §b§f§cradioactive dusts§f§f
- §bSolinium Nugget§f → from §bHBM processing chain§f
- §bMachine Chassis§f → from §bNC Manufactory§f
- §bCopper Solenoid§f → from §bCopper + Redstone + Iron§f in vanilla crafting

§eTip§f: Build a §bDecay Hastener§f as soon as you start processing §b§f§cspent nuclear fuel§f§f — the Decay Hastener can turn §b§f§chazardous isotopes§f§f (Thorium, Radium) into §b§f§cstable Lead ingots§f§f, which are useful in their own right for §b§f§cother NC recipes§f§f.
